note: MOE-FULL-15 — official machine-readable MoE certification manifest. Embedded into the binary (include_str!) and used by the controlled production path to gate execution. Scopes: certified_fixture (numerically certified vs HF f64 on a tiny end-to-end fixture), certified_partial (a real-checkpoint single-layer MoE-block sub-reference is also certified), certified_scaled (also certified on a topology-representative SCALE fixture mirroring the real large-checkpoint structure — expert count, top-k, GQA, shared, MLA), experimental, unsupported. SCALE certification is of the topology/routing, NOT the multi-GB real weights (those cannot be downloaded/committed).

families.real_checkpoint_partial: mixtral_layer0 (real Mixtral layer-0 MoE block, <1e-6 vs HF)
families.scale_topology: mixtral_scale: 8 experts, top-2, GQA 4:1 (Mixtral-8x7B topology), end-to-end 1.639e-07 vs HF
families.limitations: topology certified; the multi-GB real Mixtral-8x7B weights are NOT downloaded/certified

families.real_checkpoint_partial: qwen2_moe_layer0 (real Qwen2-MoE layer-0 MoE block vs HF)
families.scale_topology: qwen_scale: 16 experts, top-4, shared expert, GQA, qkv bias, end-to-end 1.490e-07 vs HF
families.limitations: topology certified; real large Qwen-MoE weights NOT certified; norm_topk_prob convention auto-resolved from shared_expert_gate

families.scale_topology: deepseek_scale: 16 routed, top-6, 2 shared, MLA, end-to-end 7.806e-03 vs HF (f32-vs-f64, argmax/greedy exact)
families.limitations: topology certified (synthetic weights); full-forward drift f32-vs-f64 grows with expert count (argmax/greedy exact); no real DeepSeek weights, no Q-LoRA, no YaRN
